title: derris spanogheana
intro: Derris spanogheana, also known as the common derris or Derris elliptica, is a plant species in the pea family that is native to tropical Africa and Asia. The roots of this plant contain rotenone, a toxic compound with medicinal properties, which has been used to treat various health conditions. The medicinal properties of Derris spanogheana include its ability to treat skin conditions such as eczema, reduce inflammation, and act as an antibacterial agent. Derris spanogheana is typically prepared as an herbal infusion, tincture, or topical cream to utilize its health benefits, including reducing fever, treating wounds, and relieving pain.
